issue_summary: Removed deprecated sampling API (and constructors). In this pass, the integer distributions have been updated.
javadoc_before:
/** * Create a geometric distribution with the given probability of success. *

* Note: this constructor will implicitly create an instance of * {@link Well19937c} as random generator to be used for sampling only (see * {@link #sample()} and {@link #sample(int)}). In case no sampling is * needed for the created distribution, it is advised to pass {@code null} * as random generator via the appropriate constructors to avoid the * additional initialisation overhead. * * @param p probability of success. * @throws OutOfRangeException if {@code p <= 0} or {@code p > 1}. */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Creates a geometric distribution.
     *
     * @param p Probability of success.
     * @throws OutOfRangeException if {@code p <= 0} or {@code p > 1}.
     */
